guardrails: delta is recomputed from the raw squares; the saved L3 labels are used only as a cross-check oracle.
This certifies an intrinsic two-invariant classifier of endpoint 24, not a public/PAPP theorem or a full non-affine classification.
The freeness of T/K is an orbit-stabilizer corollary of the L7 size-four orbit certificate, not a new group-action derivation.
Do not promote to public/PAPP wording; the P6/L24 boundary holds.

metadata.description: Standalone recomputation of the affine defect delta and the (selected-affine, delta) two-invariant classifier of endpoint 24.

summary.next_task: Proceed to Step 3: attempt a symbolic proof of the L16 direction lemma (selected-label xor = cell-value error direction) with the delta=4 / delta=6 dichotomy; leave the B3 15/49 matrix as a certified finite classification.
